lockFileMaintenance.description: Refresh lockfiles weekly so transitive deps don't drift even when no package.json range changes.

vulnerabilityAlerts.description: Security fixes bypass the weekly schedule, the minimum-release-age soak, and auto-merge once CI is green.

packageRules.description: Group all @nextcloud/* packages — peer deps couple them, so they should ship as one reviewable PR.
Group all Babel packages (single monorepo, lockstep releases).
Group the ESLint + Stylelint linter stack so rule-config churn lands together.
Group the Vue ecosystem — Vue + vue-loader + Vue plugins move together with breaking-change implications.
Group webpack + its loaders/plugins — they share peer-dep constraints.
Don't touch nextcloud/ocp automatically — its dev-stableXX ref must follow info.xml max-version, which is a deliberate compat decision.
Don't auto-PR Vue or @nextcloud/{vue,dialogs} majors — they carry breaking changes that need coordinated source rewrites.
Automerge GitHub Actions minor + patch + digest updates — low risk, often.
Automerge devDependency patch updates — bug-fix-only churn that doesn't need eyes.
Never automerge runtime @nextcloud/* updates — their minors regularly ship breaking changes per Nextcloud's release policy.
Never automerge any major bump anywhere.
